title: Friday Night Market at Botanical Garden
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route Botanical...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route Botanical Garden is holding a Friday Night Market on 26 April from 18:00 - 21:00 at the garden.


> There will be local crafts, food and beverages, and lovely music. The whole family is welcome.


For more information, send an e-mail to [email protected] or phone 044 874 1558.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
